meta.description: Structured negative prompt library for use with AI image generation platforms. Apply these to prevent common style drift.

midjourney.example: your prompt here --no cyberpunk urban neon horror gore swords

stable_diffusion.syntax: Paste into Negative Prompt field. Use (term:weight) for emphasis.

dalle_chatgpt.syntax: Add 'Avoid: ' followed by terms at end of prompt
dalle_chatgpt.example: Avoid: cyberpunk, horror, medieval battle, modern digital sharpness.

comfyui.syntax: Connect negative text encode node to KSampler negative input
comfyui.example: Same format as Stable Diffusion, CLIP-encoded separately

core.description: Default negative block for most New Age Glam Fantasy work

horror_occult_drift.description: Block dark occult and horror drift

medieval_fantasy_drift.description: Block medieval and epic fantasy battle drift

modern_digital_drift.description: Block hyperrealistic modern digital and contemporary clean aesthetic

aggressive_glitch.description: Block aggressive digital glitch and datamosh aesthetics

platform_ready.midjourney_core: --no cyberpunk urban neon dystopian horror blood gore medieval armor swords sharp crisp hyperrealistic modern editorial vaporwave irony glitch datamosh earthy linen sparkle generic celestial primary colors harsh contrast streetwear industrial
platform_ready.stable_diffusion_core: (cyberpunk:1.3), (urban neon:1.2), (city streets:1.1), (horror:1.4), (gore:1.5), (blood:1.5), (medieval armor:1.3), (swords:1.3), (hyperrealistic:1.2), (ultra sharp:1.2), (clean CGI:1.1), (dark occult:1.4), (demonic:1.5), (dystopian:1.2), (industrial:1.1), (vaporwave:1.2), (ironic:1.1), (datamosh:1.3), (harsh shadows:1.2), nsfw, ugly, deformed, blurry face, bad anatomy, extra limbs
platform_ready.dalle_core: Avoid: cyberpunk, urban environments, horror, gore, blood, medieval battle scenes, modern digital sharpness, harsh studio lighting, vaporwave irony, dark occult, industrial settings, datamosh glitch, earthy boho palette, generic sparkle, primary color dominance.

notes: Do not over-negate. Use the core block as default; add category blocks only when you see specific drift.
Platform behavior varies. Some models respond strongly; others barely register negative terms.
A strong positive prompt with era anchors is usually more effective than relying on negative prompts alone.
Always include the style lock line: 'Style: New Age Glam Fantasy — 1978–1986 metaphysical glam sci-fantasy, diffusion bloom/halation, prismatic pastels, VHS/CRT artifacts, analog film wear.'
